node.content-desc: event-detail-compact-game-header CUR 62% Live CTE 40% Game Lines Player Props
event-detail-market-toggle-totals Totals Total goals over 2.5 market-availability-stale

node.text: Full Game Team Total Goals (Reg. Time)
This market settles based on the official match result and regulation-time market rules for the selected World Cup game.
